mapper.select: SELECT id, date, manager, cash_payment, reservations, event, store_related, notes FROM sf_work_diary WHERE date LIKE CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '%') ORDER BY date ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sf_work_diary (date, manager, cash_payment, reservations, event, store_related, notes) VALUES (#{date}, #{manager}, #{cashPayment}, #{reservations}, #{event}, #{storeRelated}, #{notes})
mapper.update: UPDATE sf_work_diary SET date = #{date}, manager = #{manager}, cash_payment = #{cashPayment}, reservations = #{reservations}, event = #{event}, store_related = #{storeRelated}, notes = #{notes} WHERE id = #{id}
